case_title: KUNKAWUT SINTOPLERTCHAIKUL VS. NAIROBI JUDITH MASTROMARINO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED APR-03-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MASTROMARINO, NAIROBI JUDITH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINTOPLERTCHAIKUL, KUNKAWUT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASTROMARINO, NAIROBI JUDITH $3,100.20 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,250.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH CERTIFIED THAI LANGAUGE INTERPRETER BENJAWAN TERLECKY; DEFENDANT ALSO PRESENT IN COURT. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY SINTOPLERTCHAIKUL, KUNKAWUT AS TO DEFENDANT MASTROMARINO, NAIROBI JUDITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MASTROMARINO, NAIROBI JUDITH
